name: R5DistanceElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 Distance to FHIR R4 Distance
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 Distance to FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Element `Distance.value` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Distance.value` as `Equivalent`.
The implicit precision in the value should always be honored. Monetary values have their own rules for handling precision (refer to standard accounting text books).

Element `Distance.value` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Distance.value` as `Equivalent`.
The implicit precision in the value should always be honored. Monetary values have their own rules for handling precision (refer to standard accounting text books).

Element `Distance.comparator` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Distance.comparator` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The target context `Distance.comparator` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.

Element `Distance.comparator` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Distance.comparator` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The target context `Distance.comparator` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.
Element `Distance.unit` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Distance.unit` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Distance.unit` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Distance.unit` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Distance.system` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Distance.system` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Distance.system` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Distance.system` as `Equivalent`.

Element `Distance.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Distance.code` as `Equivalent`.
The preferred system is UCUM, but SNOMED CT can also be used (for customary units) or ISO 4217 for currency.  The context of use may additionally require a code from a particular system.

Element `Distance.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Distance.code` as `Equivalent`.
The preferred system is UCUM, but SNOMED CT can also be used (for customary units) or ISO 4217 for currency.  The context of use may additionally require a code from a particular system.

Element `Distance.comparator` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Distance.comparator` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The target context `Distance.comparator` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.
